name: nvms-ffi
absorption_note: Federated crate of phenotype-infra (ADR-049). Exports the nanovms-core Rust API across the C-ABI as a cdylib so that pheno-compose, pheno-compose-driver, and external C consumers can drive unikernel/VM lifecycle without depending on Rust directly. Pairs 1:1 with the nanovms-core substrate via the FfiPort trait declared in catalog/registry.yaml.
rationale: Canonical C-ABI surface for the nanovms substrate. Lives inside phenotype-infra (federated-service, federation-service role) and is the only approved FFI boundary for nanovms-core per ADR-049. Local-only sibling of phenotype-infra (no standalone GitHub repo target); canonical path is phenotype-infra/crates/nvms-ffi.
note: Federated crate (2026-06-24 registry sync). Tracked at the workspace-crate level so that consumers can resolve nvms-ffi as an independent substrate even though it has no standalone GitHub target. nanovms-core and the standalone nanovms/ repo (archived 2026-06-17) are upstream; phenocompose (archived 2026-06-17) and pheno-compose-driver are downstream.
